title: Visit – Benjamin Franklin House
content: Our tours operate at the following days and times:. **Friday** – Architectural Tour**(11am, 12pm, 1pm, 2pm, 3pm** and **4pm**). If you experience any difficulty booking tickets, please get in touch via  and we’ll be happy to reserve you a spot. We look forward to welcoming you to Benjamin Franklin’s only surviving home in fulfilment of our mission to bring history and innovation to life! In accordance with our mission to bring history and innovation to life through the world’s only surviving home of Benjamin Franklin, we also offer **virtual events**:. There are handrails on all of the staircases and there is visitor seating in all of the historic rooms. Given the Grade I nature of the building and the different levels of the building, there is no wheelchair access. Facilities include the Benjamin Franklin House Shop and restrooms located in the basement. During the Historical Experience the eighteenth century spaces serve as a stage for a drama that seamlessly blends live interpretation and audio-visual projection to tell the rich story of Franklin in London.
